name: cognitive-frameworks
description: Behavioral protocols for AI assistants. OWL (Operational Wisdom Layer) — pre-implementation reasoning. ANCHOR (Operational Persistence System) — execution continuity. DOX — documentation contract hierarchy. FUSE (Functional Utility Selection & Execution) — tool-call strategy and evidence interpretation. FLOW (Friction, Load, Overhead, and Workload) — operational efficiency evaluation, triggered by ten drag areas. WARD — authority, trust-boundary, secrets, and blast-radius governance. SISPIS — decision-routing and response calibration. Pipeline: OWL → ANCHOR → DOX → FUSE + WARD → FLOW → SISPIS.
